_comment: EXAMPLE ONLY — do not use these hashes. Generate the real sift1m_fingerprints.json via: cargo bench -p velesdb-core --features bench-sift1m --bench capture_sift1m_fingerprints. The capture bench downloads SIFT1M (once, ~168 MB), hashes the three files, and writes the real sidecar in this directory. Commit the real sidecar to pin strict verification.
